mapper.sql: a.id AS "id", a.uid AS "u.id", a.title AS "title", a.money AS "money", a.state AS "state", a.type AS "type", a.info AS "info", a.create_date AS "createDate", a.update_date AS "updateDate", u.nickname AS "u.nickname", u.idno AS "u.idno", u.lianghao AS "u.lianghao"
LEFT JOIN t_member u ON u.id = a.uid
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_balance_log( id, uid, title, money, state, `type`, info, create_date, update_date ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{u.id}, #{title}, #{money}, #{state}, #{type}, #{info}, #{createDate}, #{updateDate} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_balance_log SET uid = #{u.id}, title = #{title}, money = #{money}, state = #{state}, `type` = #{type}, info = #{info}, update_date = #{updateDate} WHERE id = #{id}
